visual_description: In a dimly lit room, an older man with white hair in a light grey suit holds a paper and looks surprised while standing next to a man in a patterned shirt and another man in a black suit. The scene then cuts to a man in a black leather jacket with a white bandage on his arm who points forward with his right hand as two men in dark suits walk through a doorway behind him. The background shows shelves, a door with a red diamond sign, and other observers.
audio_description: A male voice speaks with a tense, urgent tone, and faint ambient sounds are audible in the background.
